creator: jgrosch@MooseRiver.com
text:
The current calendar.judaic is only correct for calendar year 2000 ce.
A corrected file has been encluded here

Fix: 

Install the following file _AFTER_ 6PM PST on Dec. 31, 2000

/*
 * Judaic
 *
 * $FreeBSD$
 *
 */

#ifndef _calendar_judaic_
#define _calendar_judaic_

/*
 * Jewish calendar for the CE year 2001
 * 6 Tevet 5761 - 16 Tevet 5762
 */

01/05*  Fast of Tevet
01/06*  Parashat Vayigash
01/13*  Parashat Vayechil
01/20*  Parashat Shemoth
01/25*  Rosh Chodesh Shevat (Beginning of the month of Shevat)
01/27*  Parashat Va-Era
02/03*  Parashat Bo
02/08*  Tu bi-Shevat
02/10*  Parashat Beshalach 
02/17*  Parashat Yitro
02/24*  Be happy, It's AdarI !
02/24*  Parashat Mishpatim
02/24*  Rosh Chodesh AdarI (Beginning of the month of AdarI) 
02/24*  Shekalim
03/03*  Parashat Terumah
03/03*  Zaklor
03/08*  Fast of Esther (Battle of Purim; 1 day before Purim; fast day)
03/09*  Purim (Feast of Lots; 30 days before Pesach)
03/10*  Parashat Tezavveh
03/10*  Shushan Purim
03/17*  Parashat Ki Tissa
03/24*  Parah
03/24*  Parashat Va-Yakhel
03/24*  Parashat Pekudei
03/25*  Rosh Chodesh Nisan (Beginning of the month of Nisan)
03/31*  Parashat Va-Yikra
04/07*  Fast of the First born
04/07*  Parashat Zav
04/07*  Erev Pesah
04/07*  Haggadol
04/08*  Pesach (First Day of Passover; sabbatical)
04/09*  Pesach (Second Day of Passover; sabbatical)
04/09*  Sefirat ha-Omer begins (Counting of the Omer)
04/10*  Hol ha-Mo'ed
04/10*  Omer 2nd day
04/11*  Hol ha-Mo'ed
04/11*  Omer 3rd day
04/12*  Hol ha-Mo'ed
04/12*  Omer 4th day
04/13*  Hol Ha-Mo'ed
04/13*  Omer 5th day
04/14*  Omer 6th day
04/14*  Pesach (Seventh Day of Passover; sabbatical)
04/15*  Pesach (Last Day of Passover; 8th day of Pesach; sabbatical)
04/15*  Omer 7th day
04/16*  Omer 8th day
04/17*  Omer 9th day
04/18*  Omer 10th day
04/19*  Yom ha-Sho'ah (Remembrance of the Holocaust)
04/19*  Omer 11th day
04/20*  Omer 12th day
04/21*  Parashat Shemini
04/21*  Omer 13th day
04/22*  Omer 14th day
04/23*  Omer 15th day
04/24*  Rosh Chodesh Iyar (Beginning of the month of Iyar)
04/24*  Omer 16th day
04/25*  Yom ha-Zikaron (Israeli Memorial Day)
04/25*  Omer 17th day
04/26*  Yom ha-Atzmaut (Israel Independence Day)
04/26*  Omer 18th day
04/27*  Yizkor
04/27*  Omer 19th day
04/28*  Parashat Tazria
04/28*  Omer 20th day
04/28*  Parashat Mezora
04/29*  Omer 21th day
04/30*  Omer 22th day
05/01*  Omer 23th day
05/02*  Omer 24th day
05/03*  Omer 25th day
05/04*  Omer 26th day
05/05*  Parashat Aharei Mot
05/05*  Omer 27th day
05/05*  Parashat Kedoshim
05/06*  Omer 28th day
05/07*  Omer 29th day
05/08*  Omer 30th day
05/09*  Omer 31th day
05/10*  Omer 32th day
05/11*  Lag Ba`omer (Commemoration of the Great Rebellion)
05/11*  Omer 33th day
05/12*  Parashat Emor
05/12*  Omer 34th day
05/13*  Omer 35th day
05/14*  Omer 36th day
05/15*  Omer 37th day
05/16*  Omer 38th day
05/17*  Omer 39th day
05/18*  Omer 40th day
05/19*  Parashat Be-Har
05/19*  Omer 41th day
05/19*  Parashat Be-Hukkotai
05/20*  Omer 42th day
05/21*  Yom Yerushalayim (Reunification of Jerusalem)
05/21*  Omer 43th day
05/22*  Omer 44th day
05/23*  Rosh Chodesh Sivan (Beginning of the month of Sivan)
05/23*  Omer 45th day
05/24*  Omer 46th day
05/25*  Omer 47th day
05/26*  Parashat Be-Midbar
05/26*  Omer 48th day
05/27*  Erev Shavout
05/27*  Omer 49th day
05/28*  Shavuot (Festival of Weeks; 50 days after Pesach; sabbatical)
05/29*  Shavuot (Festival of Weeks; sabbatical)
06/02*  Parashat Naso
06/09*  Parashat Be-Ha'alotkha
06/16*  Parashat Shelah
06/22*  Rosh Chodesh Tammuz (Beginning of the month of Tammuz)
06/23*  Parashat Korah
06/30*  Parashat Hukkat
07/07*  Parashat Balak
07/08*  Fast of Shiv'a Asar B'Tammuz (Romans breach Wall of Jerusalem; fast day)
07/14*  Parashat Pinhas
07/21*  Parashat Mattot
07/21*  Rosh Chodesh Av (Beginning of the month of Av)
07/21*  Parashat Masei
07/28*  Parashat Devarim
07/29*  Fast of Tish'a B'Av (Babylon/Rome destroys Holy Temple; fast day)
08/08*  Parashat Va-Ethannan
08/11*  Parashat Ekev
08/18*  Parashat Re'eh
08/20*  First sounding of the Shofar
08/20*  Rosh Chodesh Elul (Beginning of the month of Elul)
08/25*  Parashat Shofetim
09/01*  Parashat Ki Teze
09/08*  Parashat Ki Tavo
09/15*  Parashat Nizzavim
09/17*  Erev Rosh ha-Shanah (Jewish Lunar New Year; 5762; sabbatical)
09/18*  First Day of Rosh ha-Shanah (Jewish Lunar New Year; 5762; sabbatical)
09/18*  Rosh Chodesh Tishri (Beginning of the month of Tishri)
09/20*  Fast of Gedalya (Murder of Gedalya and subsequent Exile; 1 day after Rosh Hashanah; fast day)
09/22*  Parashat Va-Yelekh
09/26*  Erev Yom Kippur (Kol Nidra)
09/27*  Yom Kippur (Day of Atonement; 9 days after Rosh Hashanah; sabbatical, fast day)
09/29*  Parashat Ha'azinu
10/01*  Erev Sucot
10/02*  Sucot (Festival of Tabernacles; 14 days after Rosh Hashanah; sabbatical)
10/03*  Sucot (sabbatical)
10/04*  Hol ha-Mo'ed
10/05*  Hol ha-Mo'ed
10/06*  Hol ha-Mo'ed
10/06*  Parashat Hol Hamoed
10/07*  Hol ha-Mo'ed
10/08*  Hoshana Rabba (7th day of Sucot)
10/09*  Shmini Atzeret (8th Day of Gathering; 1 day after Sucot; sabbatical)
10/10*  Simchas Torah (Rejoicing of the Law; sabbatical)
10/13*  Parashat Bereshit
10/18*  Rosh Chodesh Heshvan (Beginning of the month of Heshvan)
10/20*  Parashat No'ah
10/27*  Parashat Lekh Lekha
11/03*  Parashat Va-Yera
11/10*  Parashat Hayyei Sarah
11/16*  Rosh Chodesh Kislev (Beginning of the month of Kislev)
11/17*  Parashat Toledot
11/24*  Parashat Va-Yeze
12/01*  Parashat Va-Yishlah
12/08*  Parashat Va-Yeshev
12/09*  Erev Hanukkah
12/09*  Light 1st candle
12/10*  Hanukkah (First day)          
12/10*  Light 2nd candle
12/11*  Hanukkah (Second day)
12/11*  Light 3rd candle
12/12*  Hanukkah (Third day)
12/12*  Light 4th candle
12/13*  Hanukkah (Fourth day)
12/13*  Light 5th candle
12/14*  Hanukkah (Fifth day)
12/14*  Light 6th candle
12/15*  Hanukkah (Sixth day)
12/15*  Parashat Mi-Kez
12/15*  Light 7th candle
12/16*  Hanukkah (Seventh day)
12/16*  Rosh Chodesh Tevet (Beginning of the month of Tevet)
12/16*  Light 8th candle
12/17*  Hanukkah (Eighth day)
12/22*  Parashat Vayigash
12/29*  Parashat Vayechi

#endif /* !_calendar_judaic_ */
How-To-Repeat: Current file is for 2000 ce. This file places the Fast of the First 
Born on April 19. In 2001 ce the Fast of the First Born falls on 
April 7.
